MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $330.00 FILED BY TEITELBAUM, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE DBA ESCOBAR BROS. CUSTOM TAILORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-1999 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEITELBAUM, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE DBA ESCOBAR BROS. CUSTOM TAILORS $230.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $276.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
